# 吞吐量模型 (throughput_model)

> M/M/c 排队论：估算 V10 在不同流量场景下的等待时间、队列深度、SLA 达标率。

## 1. SLA 目标 (need.md §11.2)

| 指标 | 阈值 (s) |
| --- | --- |
| novel_first_token_s_lt | 5.00 |
| single_image_s_lt | 15.00 |
| five_second_clip_s_lt | 180.0 |
| queue_wait_p95_s_lt | 600.0 |

## 2. 五档场景

| 场景 | 并发用户 | 并行 worker 数 | λ/s | 利用率 ρ | P(等待>0) | P95 系统时延 s | SLA |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dev | 2 | 3 | 0.0011 | 0.0611 | 0.001 | 165.1 | ✅ |
| pilot | 20 | 6 | 0.0044 | 0.1222 | 0.000 | 165.0 | ✅ |
| launch | 200 | 24 | 0.0278 | 0.1910 | 0.000 | 165.0 | ✅ |
| scale | 1,500 | 120 | 0.1250 | 0.1719 | 0.000 | 165.0 | ✅ |
| peak_friday | 3,000 | 200 | 0.5000 | 0.4125 | 0.000 | 165.0 | ✅ |

## 3. 容量曲线 — 为达 P95 < 600s 所需 worker 数

| 并发用户 | 最少 worker | 实际 P95 s | 吞吐量 /min |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 50 | 3 | 258.8 | 0.4170 |
| 100 | 4 | 346.3 | 0.8330 |
| 200 | 6 | 472.3 | 1.67 |
| 500 | 13 | 486.0 | 4.17 |
| 1,000 | 25 | 404.2 | 8.33 |
| 2,000 | 48 | 413.0 | 16.67 |
| 5,000 | 116 | 593.4 | 41.67 |

## 4. 复现

```bash
python -m tools.data_models.throughput_model
```
